titleStmt.title: SII 24.281: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 281. (A.R. No. 46 of 1891.) II PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: The inscription is in Sanskrit engraved in Grantha characters of about the 13th century. It describes Ravivarman alias Saṁgrāmadhīra or Kulaśēkhara as the son of Jayasiṁha and Umādēvī. According to this inscription Ravivarman was born in the Śaka year 1188 (as given in chronogram dēhavyāpya) = A.D. 1266-67, married a Pāṇḍya princess and took possession of Kēraḷa in his 33rd year, i.e., A.D. 1299-1300. He also defeated a Vīrapāṇḍya and at the age of 46 (i.e., about 1312-13 A.D.) got himself crowned on the banks of Vēgavati.

It records that the king set up an image of Raṅganātha, celebrated the festival of lights and provided for payment, on the day of Śatabhishaj in the month of Kanyā, i.e., Puraṭṭāśi, of 100 paṇas each to 50 learned men. The inscription in verse, is said to have been composed by Kavibhūshaṇa.
(Published in Ep. Ind., Vol. IV, pp. 148 ff.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.hi: svasti śrī jayasiṅha Ityabhihitassōmānvayōttamsakō rājāsīdiha kēraḷēṣu viṣayē nāthō yadukṣmābhṛtām § jātōsmādravivarmmabhūpatirumādēvyām kumāraśśivāddēhavyāpyaśakābdabhāji samayē dēhīva vīrō �saḥ § 1 kṣayannītvā sōyam kalibalamivārātini vaha
śrīmat kṛtvā nijasaha carīm pāṇḍyatanayām § trayastrimśadvarṣō

yaśa Iva yayau kēraḷapadam rirakṣa svam rāṣṭrannagaramiva kēraḷambamadhipaḥ § 2 jitvā saṅgrāmadhīrō nṛpatiradhiraṇam vidviṣam vīrapāṇḍyam kṛtvā sau pāṇḍya cōḷāñcaya Iva tanumāt kēraḷēbhyōpyadhīnān § ṣaṭcatvā rimśadabdastaṭabhuvi mukuṭandhāraya nvēgavatyāḥ krīḍām siṅhāsanasthaściramakṛta mahīkīrttivāṇīramāhiḥ § 3 Āmērōrāma

layādā pūrvvādā ca paścimādacalāt § yadukulaśēkhara Ēṣa kṣōṇīṭha kula śēkharaḥ svayambūbhujē § 4 svastiśrī candrakulamaṅgalapradīpayādavanā rāyaṇa . kēraḷadēśapuṇyapariṇāma . nāmāntarakarṇa . kūpakasārvvabhauma . kulaśikharipratiṣṭhāpitagaruḍaddhvaja . kōḷam bapuravarādhīśvara . śrī patma (dma)nābhapadakamala paramārādhaka . pra
ṇatarāja pratiṣṭhācāryya . vimatarāja bandīkāra . dharmmatarumūlakanda . satgu (dgu)ṇālaṅkāra . catuṣṣaṣṭikalāval

bha . dakṣiṇabhōjarāja . saṅgrāmadhīra mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara jayasiṅha dēvanandana ravivarmma mahārāja śrīkula śēkhara dēva § kṛtvādurnnayavairi naiṛtaśamam samskārasaṭhaśōdhitē nidrāṇāmadhidēvatānnirupa

mairabhyarccya maulyādibhiḥ § dharmmairantaradhiṣṭhitē sahṛdayaissaṅgrāmadhīraḥ kṛtiraṅgēsmit sumanōdhivāsamakarōllāsyē niyujyatrayīm § 5 labdhā sāgaranēmibhūmiviṣayārantum pratiṣṭhā yatastasmai śrīkulaśēkharō yadu patistrikṣatracūḍāmaṇiḥ § raṅgēsmin kamalāsakhāya harayē ramyām prati ṣṭhāndadau

santaḥ pratyupakurvvatē hyupakṛtāḥ sarvvē kimatrātbhū(dbhu)tam § 6 bhūpāḷairiḷa kārttavīryya sagarairyyaḥ pūrvvamāsīt kṛtaḥ paścāt prauḍatamōharam yadupatistam bhadradīpōtsavam § cakrē śakra Ivāśrayassumanasām samrāṭtrayīdharmmavidraṅgēsminrucīrāṅkasamśritaramā rōciṣṇavē viṣṇavē . 7

sāmrājāmiva yassatām samudabhūttaistairgguṇairmmātṛkā saiṣa śrī kulaśēkharaśśatabhiṣaktārē sakanyāravau § bhaṭṭēbhyaḥ puratōtra raṅga nṛpatē pañcāśatē sākṣiṇaḥ pratyēkam pratihāyanam paṇaśatandā tum pratiṣṭhām vyadhāt § 8 kavibhūṣaṇasya §
svasti kurmma stayidharmma varmmaṇē ravi varmmaṇē . raṇakarmma sthitādharmma rmma rātiśarmmaṇē
p.note: This may be restored as: sthitādharmmakarmmaṭhārātiśarmmaṇē
p.hi: § 9 durbalasya balam rājētyēṣā satyā sarasvati . saṅgrāmadhīrō dharmmasya durbalasya balam kalau § 10 raviśca ravivarmmā ca dvāvimau tējasānnidhī . Ēkasyānhi(hni) pratāpaśrī rapāsya tvaharnniśam § 11 kṛṣṇaśca ravivarmmā ca yaduvamśō kbha(dbha)vāvubhau .

Ēkō gōpavadhūjārassvadāraikaparōparaḥ . 12 rājyābhiṣēkakāmā nām ravivarmmamahīpatē § puṣpābhiṣēkō bhūpānāntvatpadāmbhōjadhāraṇam . 13 gurukalpadrumēndrāḍhyāndyām karōṣi ravē mahīm § jñātā dātā satām pātā mahatām kinnu duṣkaram . 14 saṅgrāmadhīra tvadrājyē cōrō nāstīti
vāṅaṣā § campakadyutisarvvasvacōrastēmṛ grahvassayam . 15 dṛṣṭvā dakṣiṇa bhōja tvām parē bibhyati tadvaram § paradārānapi draṣṭum bibhēṣi tvam hi sarvvadā . 16 Ēkassvādu na bhu
tētyētat kinna śśrutam vacaḥ § Ēkassvādu jagat sarvvam bhuṅkṣē yādavabhūpatē . 17 kathandakṣiṇa bhōjatvam bruvatē

buddhimadvaram § dattam satbhya(dbhya)ssadā paścādvittam yattannabuddhyasē . 18 ripūnēkō jayāmīti raṇē mādṛpya yādava § bāhuḥ khaṭgō(ḍgō) manō vājī sahāyāḥ kinna sannitē . 19 prāyōnadōṣa strīhatyā rājñām rāmasadharmmaṇām § satām sahacarīm hamsī ravivarmmandaridratām . 20 dhanam sarvvandadāmiti kathantē yādava

vratam § brahmāṇḍabhāṇḍāgārēsmin sabinōṣi yaśōdhanam . 21 sē vyastaistairgguṇairēva sēvitum yaddadāsi naḥ . Ēṣā yadupatē satyamikṣubhakṣaṇadakṣiṇā . 22 kulaśēkharabhūpāḷa ḥ siṅhāsana ntjīṣatvayam . siṅhāsanajuṣō lōkē sthāvarā Ēvabhūbhṛtaḥ . 23 saṅgrāmadhīra Ityētamma
ntam pañcākṣaram budhāḥ . japantō durggatiñjitvā prāpnuvanti param śi vam . 24 Itiyādavakīrttindōḥ kalāṣṣōḍaśasurabhīkṛtasvāṅgau . yadu nāthau nāthau naḥ kṛtamaparaiścittadēvanaradēvaiḥ § 26

div.p: Digital edition of SII 24.281 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
